CommandOutcome.docs: Unified return type for all driver command methods. bin reads stdout/stderr and emits them, then exits with exit_code.

ArchInput.docs: Typed input for the arch command family.

ArchDriver.docs: Primary adapter driver for the arch command family. Holds an injected ArchService; exposes handle(input) -> CommandOutcome.

ConventionsInput.docs: Typed input for the conventions command family.

ConventionsDriver.docs: Primary adapter driver for the conventions command family. Holds an injected ConventionsService; exposes handle(input) -> CommandOutcome.

DemoInput.docs: Typed input for the demo command family.

DemoDriver.docs: Primary adapter driver for the demo command family. Holds an injected DemoService; exposes handle(input) -> CommandOutcome.

ExportSchemaInput.docs: Input DTO for the domain export-schema command.

DomainInput.docs: Typed input for the domain command family.

DomainDriver.docs: Primary adapter driver for the domain command family. Holds an injected ExportSchemaService; exposes handle(input) -> CommandOutcome.

DryInput.docs: Typed input for the dry command family.

DryDriver.docs: Primary adapter driver for the dry command family. Holds an injected DryDriverService; exposes handle(input) -> CommandOutcome.

FileInput.docs: Typed input for the file command family.

GitInput.docs: Typed input for the git command family.

GuardInput.docs: Typed input for the guard command family.

GuardDriver.docs: Primary adapter driver for the guard command family. Holds an injected GuardCheckService; exposes handle(input) -> CommandOutcome.

HookName.docs: Known hook names for the hook dispatch subcommand.

HookInput.docs: Typed input for the hook command family.

HookDriver.docs: Primary adapter driver for the hook command family. Holds injected use-case interactors; exposes handle(input) -> CommandOutcome.

PrInput.docs: Typed input for the pr command family.

PrDriver.docs: Primary adapter driver for the pr command family. Holds an injected PrCommandService; exposes handle(input) -> CommandOutcome.

RefVerifyRunInput.docs: Input DTO for sotp ref-verify run.

RefVerifyCheckApprovedInput.docs: Input DTO for sotp ref-verify check-approved.

RefVerifyInput.docs: Typed input for the ref_verify command family.

RefVerifyDriver.docs: Primary adapter driver for the ref_verify command family. Holds a single injected RefVerifyAggregateService; exposes handle(input) -> CommandOutcome.

ReviewInput.docs: Typed input for the review command family.

ReviewDriver.docs: Primary adapter driver for the review command family. Holds a single injected ReviewService aggregate; exposes handle(input) -> CommandOutcome.

SemanticDupInput.docs: Typed input for the semantic_dup command family.

SemanticDupDriver.docs: Primary adapter driver for the semantic_dup command family. Holds an injected SemanticDupDriverService; exposes handle(input) -> CommandOutcome.

SignalGateName.docs: Selects the gate context when resolving strictness from signal-gates.json. Mirrors cli_composition::signal::SignalGateName.

SignalInput.docs: Typed input for the signal command family.

SignalDriver.docs: Primary adapter driver for the signal command family. Holds an injected SignalService; exposes handle(input) -> CommandOutcome.

TelemetryReportInput.docs: Input DTO for sotp telemetry report.

TelemetryInput.docs: Typed input for the telemetry command family.

TelemetryDriver.docs: Primary adapter driver for the telemetry command family. Holds a single injected TelemetryAggregateService; exposes handle(input) -> CommandOutcome.

TrackInput.docs: Typed input for the track command family.

TrackDriver.docs: Primary adapter driver for the track command family. Holds an injected TrackService; exposes handle(input) -> CommandOutcome.

VerifyInput.docs: Typed input for the verify command family.

VerifyDriver.docs: Primary adapter driver for the verify command family. Holds an injected VerifyService; exposes handle(input) -> CommandOutcome.

PlanInput.docs: Typed input for the plan command family. Carries raw (unresolved) CLI args; prompt resolution and briefing-file validation are performed by PlannerInteractor.

PlanDriver.docs: Primary adapter driver for the plan command family. Holds an injected PlannerService; exposes handle(PlanInput) -> CommandOutcome.

cli_driver::ref_verify::format_pair_stat.docs: Format a missing-or-non-pass pair entry as a bracketed status string.
